question: 1X NEO humanoid robot ships to first consumer homes by June 30, 2026
reason: 1X Technologies has commenced full-scale production of NEO robots, with consumer shipments scheduled for 2026.
evidence: 1X opened a 58,000-square-foot factory in Hayward, California, aiming to produce 10,000 NEO robots in 2026.
The company has already produced 17,000 motors since opening the factory.
1X plans to deliver the first NEOs to private customers by the end of 2026.
NEO is available for pre-order, with first orders shipping to consumer homes in 2026.
1X has sold out its entire first-year production capacity of over 10,000 units within five days of opening pre-orders.
searchQueries: 1X Technologies NEO humanoid robot consumer shipment May 2026
